title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.412 - Sergeant Charles R. Long Memorial Bridge designated for a bridge crossing on U. S. Highway 24 in Independence
text:
227.412.  Sergeant Charles R. Long Memorial Bridge designated for a bridge crossing on U. S. Highway 24 in Independence. — The bridge crossing over the Union Pacific Railroad located on U.S. Highway 24 near Wilson Road in the Fairmont business district of the city of Independence in Jackson County shall be designated the "Sergeant Charles R. Long Memorial Bridge".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such bridge, with the costs to be paid for by private donations.
(L. 2010 H.B. 1941)
